languages.text: Священный археотех поврежден, и исцелить его может лишь служитель Бога-Машины, обладающий высоким саном и благословением Движущей Силы. Отыскать его можно в обители Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-Семнадцать, расположенной в системе Фурибундус.

The sacred archeotech is damaged, and it can only be repaired by a servant of the Machine God possessing high rank and the blessing of the Motive Force. Such a person may be sought on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 in the Furibundus System.
languages.original_text: Священный археотех поврежден, и исцелить его может лишь служитель Бога-Машины, обладающий высоким саном и благословением Движущей Силы. Отыскать его можно в обители Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-Семнадцать, расположенной в системе Фурибундус.

traits.locale_text: The sacred archeotech is damaged, and it can only be repaired by a servant of the Machine God possessing high rank and the blessing of the Motive Force. Such a person may be sought on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 in the Furibundus System.

The sacred archeotech is damaged, and it can only be repaired by a servant of the Machine God possessing high rank and the blessing of the Motive Force. Such a person may be sought on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 in the Furibundus System.

The sacred archeotech is damaged, and it can only be repaired by a servant of the Machine God possessing high rank and the blessing of the Motive Force. Such a person may be sought on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 in the Furibundus System.

languages.text: La sagrada arqueotecnología está dañada y solo la podría sanar un sirviente del Dios Máquina de alto rango con la bendición de la Fuerza Motriz. Tal vez encuentres a alguien así en la estación enclaustrada de Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, en el sistema Furibundus.
languages.original_text: The sacred archeotech is damaged, and it can only be healed by a servant of the Machine God possessing high rank and the blessing of the Motive Force. Such a person may be sought on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 in the Furibundus System.

traits.locale_text: La sagrada arqueotecnología está dañada y solo la podría sanar un sirviente del Dios Máquina de alto rango con la bendición de la Fuerza Motriz. Tal vez encuentres a alguien así en la estación enclaustrada de Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, en el sistema Furibundus.

languages.text: 这台神圣的远古科技机械已经损坏，只有拥有高阶头衔、蒙受源力赐福的万机之神仆从才能将其修复。这样的人物，或许能在怒焰星系那与世隔绝的卡利西斯祭坛17号星站上找到。
languages.original_text: The sacred archeotech is damaged, and it can only be healed by a servant of the Machine God possessing high rank and the blessing of the Motive Force. Such a person may be sought on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 in the Furibundus System.

traits.locale_text: 这台神圣的远古科技机械已经损坏，只有拥有高阶头衔、蒙受源力赐福的万机之神仆从才能将其修复。这样的人物，或许能在怒焰星系那与世隔绝的卡利西斯祭坛17号星站上找到。

languages.text: L'appareil sacré est endommagé, et seul un serviteur du Dieu-Machine de haut rang possédant le don de la Force Motrice sera en mesure de le réparer. Il est possible de trouver de tels individus dans le cloître de la station Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 dans le système de Furibundus.
languages.original_text: The sacred archeotech is damaged, and it can only be healed by a servant of the Machine God possessing high rank and the blessing of the Motive Force. Such a person may be sought on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 in the Furibundus System.

traits.locale_text: L'appareil sacré est endommagé, et seul un serviteur du Dieu-Machine de haut rang possédant le don de la Force Motrice sera en mesure de le réparer. Il est possible de trouver de tels individus dans le cloître de la station Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 dans le système de Furibundus.

languages.text: Kutsal arkeotek hasar aldı ve sadece Makine Tanrı'nın yüksek mevkiye ve Devinim Gücü'nün kutsamasına sahip bir hizmetkârı tarafından iyileştirilebilir. Böyle bir kimse, Furibundus Sistemi'ndeki dış dünyadan kopuk Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 istasyonunda aranabilir.
languages.original_text: The sacred archeotech is damaged, and it can only be healed by a servant of the Machine God possessing high rank and the blessing of the Motive Force. Such a person may be sought on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 in the Furibundus System.

traits.locale_text: Kutsal arkeotek hasar aldı ve sadece Makine Tanrı'nın yüksek mevkiye ve Devinim Gücü'nün kutsamasına sahip bir hizmetkârı tarafından iyileştirilebilir. Böyle bir kimse, Furibundus Sistemi'ndeki dış dünyadan kopuk Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 istasyonunda aranabilir.

languages.text: 聖なるアーケオテクノロジーが損傷しており、それを修復できるのは、機械神に仕える高位で動機力に恵まれた者のみである。そのような者は、フリビュンダス星系にある閉鎖された駅であるアルター・テンプル・カリシス・エクスト17で探すことができるだろう。
languages.original_text: The sacred archeotech is damaged, and it can only be healed by a servant of the Machine God possessing high rank and the blessing of the Motive Force. Such a person may be sought on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 in the Furibundus System.

traits.locale_text: 聖なるアーケオテクノロジーが損傷しており、それを修復できるのは、機械神に仕える高位で動機力に恵まれた者のみである。そのような者は、フリビュンダス星系にある閉鎖された駅であるアルター・テンプル・カリシス・エクスト17で探すことができるだろう。

languages.text: Die heilige Archäotech ist beschädigt und kann nur von einem hochrangigen Diener des Maschinengottes mit dem Segen der Antriebskraft geheilt werden. Eine solche Person ist möglicherweise auf der Klosterstation Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 im Furibundus-System zu finden.
languages.original_text: The sacred archeotech is damaged, and it can only be healed by a servant of the Machine God possessing high rank and the blessing of the Motive Force. Such a person may be sought on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 in the Furibundus System.

traits.locale_text: Die heilige Archäotech ist beschädigt und kann nur von einem hochrangigen Diener des Maschinengottes mit dem Segen der Antriebskraft geheilt werden. Eine solche Person ist möglicherweise auf der Klosterstation Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 im Furibundus-System zu finden.
